claims.text:
FEES AND PAYMENT
Client shall pay Provider a monthly fee of $18,500, due within fifteen (15) days of
invoice date.

SERVICE LEVEL PENALTIES
If Provider's uptime falls below 99.5% in any calendar month, Client shall be entitled to
a service credit of 5% of that month's fee for each full percentage point of downtime
below the threshold, up to a maximum credit of 25% of the monthly fee.

_______________________          _______________________
Northwind Analytics Pvt Ltd       Solstice Retail Group
Priya Nathan, VP Operations       Daniel Osei, Chief Revenue Officer

INVOICE #INV-2026-0447
Billed to: Solstice Retail Group
From: Northwind Analytics Pvt Ltd
Date: March 1, 2026
Description: Monthly analytics platform subscription - February 2026
Amount Due: $18,500.00
Due Date: March 16, 2026
Payment terms: Net 15.
This addendum modifies the payment terms of the original Service Agreement between Northwind Analytics and Solstice Retail Group.
Effective April 1, 2026, the monthly fee is increased to $21,000, payable within ten (10) days of invoice.
